steps: Submit formal reclaim to MUFG Custody for JPY 119,850 overpayment on Nintendo Co Ltd dividend with JP-NO treaty rate documentation
Provide evidence that 10% treaty rate applies (not standard 20.42%) with Norwegian tax residency certificate for CLIENT05
Reference Japanese National Tax Agency treaty provisions confirming reduced withholding for Norwegian residents
Request MUFG process refund through Japanese tax authority reclaim procedure within statutory timeframe

references.title: Japanese National Tax Agency – Tax Treaties
